<Meta title="api/widgets/SelectWidgetPlugin" />
<DocsHeader title="SelectWidgetPlugin" breadCrumbs="API reference » widgets » SelectWidgetPlugin" type="WidgetPlugin">
  [Properties](#properties) · [JSON Schema Options](#json-schema-options)
</DocsHeader>

Select Widget will render a JSON Schema `type: "string", enum: [string]` as a selection.

Three select components are available and you can choose between each type using the `x-widget` property:

- per default it will render as normal select input
- `x-widget: "select:taglist` will render a horizontal options represented as tags to be selected directly
- `x-widget: "select:radiogroup` will render a vertical radiogroup with all options visible

```tsx
{
 "type": "string",
 "enum": ["month", "quarter", "year"],
 "x-widget": "select:radiogroup"
}
```

## Properties

### id


```tsx
id: 'select-widget'
```


### use


```tsx
use: (node) =>
        (node.schema.type?.includes?.('string') || node.schema.type === 'string') && Array.isArray(node.schema.enum)
```


### SelectWidget


```tsx
Widget: SelectWidget
```



## JSON Schema Options

JSON Schema string-enum options

```tsx
{
   "type": "string",
   "enum": ["month", "quarter", "year"],
   "x-options": {
      "showHeader": false
   }
}
```


### classNames


```tsx
classNames?: string[];
```


additional classnames the ui should add to the root of this data point

### description


```tsx
description?: string;
```


description of this data point

### disabled


```tsx
disabled: boolean;
```


if changes to this data point are disabled

### placeholder


```tsx
placeholder?: string;
```


if supported, will add a placeholder for the input element

### hidden


```tsx
hidden: boolean;
```


if this data point should be hidden from display

### title


```tsx
title?: string;
```


title of this data point

### readOnly


```tsx
readOnly?: boolean;
```


disable edit of form, but allow selection and copy of value

### required


```tsx
required?: boolean;
```


flag data as required (visual only)

### canAddItem


```tsx
canAddItem?: boolean;
```


arrays only: if an item may be added without causing a validation error

### canRemoveItem


```tsx
canRemoveItem?: boolean;
```


arrays only: if an item may be removed without causing a validation error

### enum


```tsx
enum?: string[];
```


list of titles for the JSON Schema enum options - matched by index

### variant


```tsx
variant?: ChipProps['variant'];
```


chip variant for taglist

### horizontal


```tsx
horizontal?: boolean;
```


set to true to render radiogroup in a single line

### loading


```tsx
loading?: boolean;
```


### showHeader


```tsx
showHeader?: boolean;
```


if false, will hide title. will hide complete title-header if no menu-actions are available

### widgetMenuItems


```tsx
widgetMenuItems?: WidgetMenuItems;
```
